name: query_database
description: Query a Notion database to retrieve pages that match specified filter criteria and sort order. Supports rich filtering by property values (text, number, date, select, etc.) and compound filters with AND/OR logic.

parameters.name: database_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the database to query. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional filter object to narrow results. Supports property-based filters (equals, contains, before/after for dates, etc.) and compound filters with 'and'/'or' arrays.

parameters.name: sorts
parameters.description: Optional array of sort criteria. Each sort specifies a property name and direction ('ascending' or 'descending').

parameters.name: start_cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's next_cursor to get the next page of results.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page (max 100, default 100).
